result.stdout:
Usage: buildcharts [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Generate build using declarative metadata
  init          Scaffolds
  pull          Pull a build chart from an OCI registry
  summary       Generate summary from last docker build
  update        Download OCI chart dependencies and refresh Chart.lock
  version       Show version information

Run 'buildcharts [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate build using declarative metadata

Usage: buildcharts generate [options] <use-inline-dockerfiles>

Arguments:
  use-inline-dockerfiles  Use inlined dockerfiles
                          Default value is: False.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.

result.stdout:
Pull a build chart from an OCI registry

Usage: buildcharts pull [options] <reference>

Arguments:
  reference             OCI reference in the form registry/repo[:tag]

Options:
  -u|--untar            Untar the downloaded chart into the current directory.
  --untardir <DIR>      Destination when using --untar (defaults to current
                        directory).
                        Default value is:
                        /tmp/inspectra-static-dotnet-buildcharts-0.0.3-67abec5bd7c9490088831397a96d347f.
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>  Output directory (default: current)
                        Default value is:
                        /tmp/inspectra-static-dotnet-buildcharts-0.0.3-67abec5bd7c9490088831397a96d347f.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.
